title: ORDER BY over UNION / EXCEPT / INTERSECT is ignored
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2 (b TEXT, c REAL, d DATE);
INSERT INTO t2 VALUES (NULL, NULL, NULL);
SELECT * FROM t2 UNION ALL SELECT * FROM t2 ORDER BY c;
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM t2 UNION SELECT * FROM t2 WHERE b IS NOT NULL) AS subquery ORDER BY d;
key_bug_features: ORDER BY clause ignored in UNION operations
